name: QuestEx Gold & Copper Ltd.
description: QuestEx Gold & Copper Ltd. is a Canada-based exploration-stage company primarily engaged in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company focuses on identifying and advancing gold, silver, and copper deposits, with its principal mineral assets located in the Golden Triangle and the Toodoggone area of British Columbia. By leveraging strategic partnerships and exploration initiatives, QuestEx aims to unlock value within these highly prospective geological regions, contributing to the broader mineral resource development sector in Canada.
